description: Spirit island is a boardgame where players play spirits to prevent the invaders from destroying the island.

0.1.0.description: Initial release for Spirit Island Archipelago.
0.1.0.title: v0.1.0

0.1.1.description:
## V0.1.1

### Client & APworld
- Added option to select 'Any' as spirit to beat adversary with
- Added option to have blight be unlockable through checks (whilst possibly lowering the starting total)
- Added option to lock spirits (and aspects) behind items.

### APworld
- Added **advanced goal selection**, which allows weighted randomised goals, and in general, goals in yaml format instead of a combined string (see Game Page for examples/more details)
- Added hint to randomiser to place +Cardplay/Energy/Blight in early spheres (at least until back to normal)
- Fixed France and Habsburg naming, causing them not to count for checks
- Changed errors to be option errors instead of generic exceptions (more in line with their cause)

### Client
- Added an exit button
- Fixed install script failing due to incorrect BepInEx version

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Wouter17/Spirit-Archipelago/compare/0.1.0...0.1.1
0.1.1.title: v0.1.1

0.1.2.description:
## V0.1.2

### Client & APworld
- Store goal and goal progress on slot data (prevents goal checks from being triggered by collect)
- Added option to shuffle undiscovered cards to the top of the powerdecks
- Added option to show on powercards what item they will unlock
- Added option to hint what item a powercard will unlock

### Client
- (Re)organised the client into separate modules
- Added missing license documentation to the distributable folder

### APworld (added on 21.03)
- Fixed off-by-one error between items and locations when adding aspects which introduce new minor powers
- Added option to enable/disable removing cards when filler items are needed (too many locations)

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Wouter17/Spirit-Archipelago/compare/0.1.1...0.1.2
0.1.2.title: v0.1.2

0.1.3.description:
## V0.1.3

### Client & APworld
- Added option to shard spirit and aspect unlocks across multiple checks
- Added option to add extra copies of spirits and aspects to the item pool
- Added element filler items
- Fixed aspects not unlocking due to incorrect name

### Client
- Fixed the Archipelago logo blocking clicks
- Disconnect Archipelago connection code from main game thread (should prevent crashes on connect)

### APworld
- Fixed unique power accessibility determination
- Fixed "Flowing and Silent Forms Dart By" cardname
- Replaced "difficulty" with "level" to accurately reflect the selected level

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Wouter17/Spirit-Archipelago/compare/0.1.2...0.1.3
0.1.3.title: v0.1.3

0.1.3-hf1.description:
## V0.1.3 Hotfix 1

_Only the client needs to get updated for this hotfix, and you can still resume your 0.1.3 games using the new updated client._

### Client:
- Fix victory locations not being checked due to still using difficulty instead of level

**Changelog**: https://github.com/Wouter17/Spirit-Archipelago/compare/0.1.3...0.1.3-hf1

---

_previous patch notes_

## V0.1.3

### Client & APworld
- Added option to shard spirit and aspect unlocks across multiple checks
- Added option to add extra copies of spirits and aspects to the item pool
- Added element filler items
- Fixed aspects not unlocking due to incorrect name

### Client
- Fixed the Archipelago logo blocking clicks
- Disconnect Archipelago connection code from main game thread (should prevent crashes on connect)

### APworld
- Fixed unique power accessibility determination
- Fixed "Flowing and Silent Forms Dart By" cardname
- Replaced "difficulty" with "level" to accurately reflect the selected level

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Wouter17/Spirit-Archipelago/compare/0.1.2...0.1.3
0.1.3-hf1.title: V0.1.3-HF1

0.1.4.description:
## V0.1.4

### Client
- Refresh goals on connect (actually already published in hotfix)
- Fix initial load freezing game
- Fix scouting freezing game
- Fix goal check freezing game
- Fix increments incorrectly loading

### APworld
- Fixed item classification for filler items
- Add description for element items
- Automate names based on in-game files (instead of wiki)
  Fixes name for:
    - _Call on Midnight's Dreams_
    - _Flash-fires_
    - _Regrow From Roots_
    - _Dark Skies Loose A Stinging Rain_
    - _Foundations Sink Into Mud_
    - _Mark Territory With Scars and Teeth_

  Fixes expansion for _Roiling Bog and Snagging Thorn_

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Wouter17/Spirit-Archipelago/compare/0.1.3-hf1...0.1.4
0.1.4.title: V0.1.4
